selections.name: Lots To Love
selections.reason: Drops in class after tackling a Bm72 at Canterbury. Proven on wet tracks and looks well placed here.

selections.name: Thundering Falcon
selections.reason: Coming off a solid win at Grafton in soft going. Can handle the conditions and should be competitive.

selections.name: Hardyo
selections.reason: Veteran who just won at Coonabarabran on a wet track. Form is solid and handles the sting out of the ground.

selections.name: Zou Big Boy
selections.reason: Consistent type who rarely runs a bad race. Drawn well and gets a claim.

danger_horse.name: Bill Peyto
danger_horse.reason: Has plenty of wet track experience and can run into the placings from the inside draw.

selections.name: Scathingly
selections.reason: Has shown ability in previous starts and gets a good setup here to break through.

selections.name: Rufus Atticus
selections.reason: Resuming but has shown glimpses of talent. Drawn well and can feature fresh.

selections.name: Staccato
selections.reason: Solid second up run last start. Inside draw is a plus and should be right in the mix.

selections.name: Euphoric Miss
selections.reason: Fitter for two runs back and can improve sharply from a good barrier.

danger_horse.name: Spellecast
danger_horse.reason: Can improve on recent efforts and the claim helps.

selections.name: Leovanni
selections.reason: Has been knocking on the door with consecutive placings. Drawn perfectly to get the job done.

selections.name: Redaluca Girl
selections.reason: Consistent form line and handles wet tracks well. Major threat despite the wider draw.

selections.name: Ordinary Angel
selections.reason: Solid second last start and looks ready to peak. Definite contender.

selections.name: Fined For Speeding
selections.reason: Holding form well and stays in the mix. Wide draw is the main concern.

danger_horse.name: Moon Treaty
danger_horse.reason: Has been around the mark recently and can sneak into the exotics.

selections.name: Zousanity
selections.reason: Resuming but has strong fresh form. Tricky gate but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Oakfield Mars
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to fire. Good draw and should be right in the finish.

selections.name: Long Time Lovers
selections.reason: Has ability and is one of the leading chances if she brings her best.

selections.name: Love You Anyway
selections.reason: Made ground last start and dropping in grade. Can surprise at odds.

danger_horse.name: Sir Skipalong
danger_horse.reason: Resuming after one run. May need the outing but has potential.

selections.name: Set To Prophet
selections.reason: In excellent form with consecutive wins. Handles soft/heavy going and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Dunstall The Gun
selections.reason: Consistent performer who gets the inside draw. Will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Smart Buy
selections.reason: Capable of better than recent runs suggest. Can bounce back here.

selections.name: Macleay
selections.reason: Veteran who has the ability but needs to show more. Good draw helps.

danger_horse.name: Ichika
danger_horse.reason: Ran well last start and can figure in the minor placings.

selections.name: Jagerschnitzel
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Good draw and form stacks up nicely for this.

selections.name: Ephemeral
selections.reason: Progressive filly who won well fresh. Can take the next step.

selections.name: Imperial State
selections.reason: Mixing form but has the class. Wide draw is a slight concern.

selections.name: Olufsen
selections.reason: Consistent type but has to overcome a terrible barrier.

danger_horse.name: Fallen
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the inside and can improve second-up.

selections.name: Athena's Treasure
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class from a Highway race. Drawn well and is the clear top pick.

selections.name: Northern Boogie
selections.reason: Consistent form and handles wet tracks. Wide draw is the only negative.

selections.name: Oakfield Utah
selections.reason: Resuming but has shown ability. Can run a bold race fresh.

selections.name: Lune D'excellence
selections.reason: Needs to lift but has the talent to be competitive in this grade.

danger_horse.name: Deebo
danger_horse.reason: Second-up and can improve. Worth including in exotics.

selections.name: Speck
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. Resuming but has excellent fresh form. Hard to beat.

selections.name: Not Written Off
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to fire. Drawn well and will be prominent.

selections.name: Cresta Run
selections.reason: Resuming but has good fresh stats. Expected to be very competitive.

selections.name: Happy Saturday
selections.reason: Resuming after a long break but has class. Watch betting.

danger_horse.name: Struff
danger_horse.reason: First-up for a new yard. Keep safe.
